channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: IRGC spokesman tells US President Donald Trump ‘You’re fired!’
item.description: Spokesman for the IRGC took jabs at US president Trump, mimicking his catchphrases and language.

item.title: ‘Unprecedented’: Israel, US carry out extensive strikes across Iran
item.description: Tehran is hit by 'a wide-scale wave of strikes' as US President Donald Trump's 48-hour ultimatum is set to expire soon.

item.title: China ‘is playing the long game’ in Iran war by staying neutral
item.description: Han Shen Lin, director of the China Office at the Asia Consultative Group, says that China is likely to remain neutral,

item.title: Iran war: What’s happening on day 24 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: The region is on edge as Trump's deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz or face attacks on power plants nears.

item.title: IEA chief warns of ‘very severe’ global energy crisis
item.description: IEA may release more oil as the Iran war hits supply, with chief Fatih Birol warning of a severe global energy crisis.

item.title: World in energy crisis worse than 1970s’ oil shocks combined, IEA head says
item.description: Energy crunch prompted by Iran war poses 'major threat' to global economy, Fatih Birol says.

item.title: Two killed after Canada Air jet hits fire truck at NYC’s LaGuardia airport
item.description: The airport has been closed and flights diverted after the aircraft operated by Jazz Aviation struck a ground vehicle.

item.title: Brothers search rubble for missing sibling under Tehran rubble after strike
item.description: Five days after a strike destroyed a building in Tehran, Mahdi Mirzahosseini’s brothers are still searching for him.

item.title: Immense damage seen in Iran’s streets after air strikes
item.description: Videos show the aftermath of strikes in Iran, as search teams recover bodies from rubble.

item.title: Asian stock markets plunge amid Trump’s ultimatum on Iran
item.description: Key indexes in Japan, South Korea and Hong Kong tumble as Iran threatens attacks on energy infrastructure across region.
